pages.text: Once you've saved up some coins, go looking for the Special Merchant. He spawns outside of villages all over the world.$(br)$(br)His stock $(l)directly depends on the biome$() you find him in!

pages.title: Jungle Rod
pages.text: Sold only in the Jungle. The most expensive, but also the best rod in the game.

pages.title: Sand Rod
pages.text: Sold in the Desert. A mid-tier rod with an average price.

pages.title: Ice Rod
pages.text: Sold in winter biomes. The cheapest and weakest of the custom rods.
